an8.62:1.0.1: (1) "Bhikkhus, possessing six qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefitboth himself and others.What six?
an8.62:1.0.2: (2) "Possessing five qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefitboth himself and others. What five?
an8.62:1.0.3: (3) "Possessing four qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefithimself but not others. What four?
an8.62:1.0.4: (4) "Possessing four qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefitothers but not himself. What four?
an8.62:1.0.5: (5) "Possessing three qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefithimself but not others. What three?
an8.62:1.0.6: (6) "Possessing three qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefitothers but not himself. What three?
an8.62:1.0.7: (7) "Possessing two qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefithimself but not others. What two?
an8.62:1.0.8: (8) "Possessing two qualities, a bhikkhu is ableto benefitothers but not himself. What two?
